{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/271374756?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DavidCarliez/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DavidCarliez/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DavidCarliez/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DavidCarliez/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DavidCarliez", "id": 271374756, "login": "DavidCarliez", "node_id": "U_kgDOECzZpA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DavidCarliez/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DavidCarliez/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DavidCarliez/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DavidCarliez/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DavidCarliez/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DavidCarliez", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55608", "cvss": {"score": 4.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary

In multi-tenant HTTP mode (`ENABLE_MULTI_TENANT=true`), an authenticated tenant could, under certain conditions, reach n8n-mcp's local default-scope `workflow_versions` backups instead of being confined to its own tenant scope. This affects n8n-mcp's own local workflow-version storage, not a normal n8n API capability.

## Impact

An authenticated MCP HTTP tenant could read or delete workflow-version backups stored in the default (single-tenant) scope — for example backups left from a prior single-tenant deployment or a migration period. Workflow snapshots may contain sensitive workflow configuration depending on their contents. Single-tenant and stdio deployments are not affected.

## Affected versions

`<= 2.57.3`

## Patched version

`2.57.4`

## Remediation

Upgrade to n8n-mcp `2.57.4` or later. The fix requires a complete tenant context in multi-tenant mode and fails closed for workflow-version access that cannot be attributed to a specific tenant.

## Workarounds

- Restrict network access to the HTTP endpoint (firewall / reverse proxy / VPN) so only trusted callers can reach it.
- Run in stdio mode, which has no multi-tenant HTTP surface.
- If default-scope backups from a prior single-tenant deployment are not needed, removing them eliminates the exposure.

## Credit

Reported by @DavidCarliez.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00281, "percentile": 0.20084}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2cf7-hpwf-47h9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-14T20:26:39Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2cf7-hpwf-47h9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2cf7-hpwf-47h9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55608"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-14T20:26:39Z", "references": ["https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp/security/advisories/GHSA-2cf7-hpwf-47h9", "https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp/commit/c1ca1e73697feaec5ec2a5fb7e6992a2892b62c9", "https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp/releases/tag/v2.57.4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2cf7-hpwf-47h9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp/security-advisories/GHSA-2cf7-hpwf-47h9", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp", "summary": "n8n-MCP: Incorrect authorization can expose default-scope workflow version backups in multi-tenant HTTP mode", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-14T20:26:41Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2cf7-hpwf-47h9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.57.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n-mcp"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.57.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n-MCP: Incorrect authorization can expose default-scope workflow version backups in multi-tenant HTTP mode
